VJs TV is the global broadcast network for VJ culture, audiovisual performances, and digital visual art. Watch live performances, discover artists, and explore the world of visual performance.

Follow Us

Tokyo Projection Studio

Location Tokyo, Japan
Type Projection Lab

Tokyo Projection Studio is Asia’s leading facility for projection mapping development and testing. With a miniature architectural stage and array of high-lumen projectors, artists can prototype large-scale installations in a controlled environment before deploying to real-world sites.

Equipment
  • 20K Lumen Projectors x8
  • Scale Model Stage
  • Motion Capture System
Artists
  • Luna Visuals

VJs TV is the global broadcast network for VJ culture, audiovisual performances, and digital visual art. Watch live performances, discover artists, and explore the world of visual performance.
